name: activity-badges
description: Activity counters per user (messages sent, photos uploaded, ...) plus a rule-driven badge engine that grants achievements when counters cross thresholds.
postInstall: 2. Call recordActivity(userId, 'message_sent') at the relevant hot paths
3. Call evaluateBadges(userId) after recordActivity (or on a timer) to grant any newly-earned badges
4. Customise the badge rules in lib/badges.ts to match your app's flavour
